script: echo '=== systemd anything alejandro ==='; systemctl list-unit-files --no-pager 2>&1 | grep -i alej; echo; echo '=== /etc/systemd/system alejandro ==='; sudo ls /etc/systemd/system/ 2>&1 | grep -i alej; echo; echo '=== /home/azureuser alejandro files ==='; sudo ls /home/azureuser/ 2>&1 | grep -i alej; echo; echo '=== /home alejandro homedir ==='; sudo ls /home/ 2>&1 | grep -i alej; echo; echo '=== vault alejandro keys ==='; az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query "[?contains(name,'alejandro')].name" -o tsv 2>&1; echo; echo '=== handoffs/alejandro in repo ==='; ls /home/user/Codex-Agent/handoffs/ 2>&1 | grep -i alej
